section_miscategorizations.text: CVA is located near flank tenderness on the right.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This appears to be a wording/terminology error rather than a section misplacement; it likely intended to describe right CVA (costovertebral angle) tenderness, which is an objective exam finding and belongs in O. As written, it is confusing but not clearly miscategorized into the wrong SOAP section.
